events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: the observed condition is an unpoured conduit seal fitting at a classified-area boundary — the fill hole plug is still in place with no evidence of poured sealing compound or fiber dam, meaning the seal is installed but non-functional. This is scored as `fail` (risk `high`) since it must not be closed out or energized until the compound is poured and reinspected per NEC 501.15.
